title: copisma tottum
intro: Copisma tottum, also known as the fire tree, is a plant species native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Copisma tottum include pain relief, wound healing, and potentially reducing inflammation in conditions such as arthritis. Herbal preparations of the plant, including extracts and infusions, are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
